name: invoice-generator-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Generate, validate, and manage professional invoices with tax calculations.

tools.name: generate_invoice
tools.description: Generate a professional invoice. Each item needs 'description', 'qty', and 'price' keys.

tools.name: calculate_totals
tools.description: Calculate subtotal, tax, discount, and grand total for a list of line items.

tools.name: validate_invoice
tools.description: Validate an invoice dict for required fields, correct math, and common errors.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all available invoice templates with their details.
